cases.raw_text_excerpt: Tight Channel: Trade Like a Breakout Sometimes difficult to know if breakout (BO) or Tight Channel • Assume BO and trade it like one • Tight Channel is a BO on a higher time frame
pattern_decision_points: Match the Brooks v2 chart context before treating the setup as mechanically testable.
Confirm the pattern geometry before translating it into OHLCV approximation rules.
Trade with the channel direction after small pullbacks, avoiding early countertrend fades.
Treat first reversal attempts as minor unless there is a strong breakout of the channel.
disqualifiers: Clear channel break followed by opposite follow-through.
Late entry after a climactic channel extension without room to target.
cases.ohlcv_approximation_risk: High visual dependency: OHLCV can approximate sequence and extremes, but cannot confirm drawn channel quality, trapped-trader context, or chart readability without image review.
